case_title: RAQUEL HUERTA VS. RAUL REYES et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT REYES, RAUL
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF REPORTER FEE PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT REYES, RAUL
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: BEHREND, PAUL SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR REYES, RAUL

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT RAUL REYES' WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. APPLICANT WAS SWORN IN AND EXAMINED BY THE COURT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS AND DENIED APPLICANT'S APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. RAUL REYES HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: D.LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
